text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Pre-priced constant supply (glass bottles daily, LPG) runs against a standing contract with NO requisition, RFQ, or PO. A renewal reminder fires 15 days before contract expiry. The factory floats the load/quantity to the supplier; the supplier delivers and invoices at the contract price; stores receive

and forward the invoice; the handler logs it in a reduced-field PO-format record; the DELIVERED flag is set to skip delivery tracking; accounts settle (two-way match at contract price) and close. The cycle repeats each cadence until the contract expires or is not renewed.
